name: FTAC Parnassus Acquisition Corp.
summary: FTAC Parnassus Acquisition Corp. intends to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses or assets. It intends to identify technology and financial services technology companies. The company was formerly known as FTAC General Acquisition Corp. FTAC Parnassus Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
